videos.title: Urban Street Motion Dataset
videos.description: High-quality street footage for object detection and tracking models. Includes pedestrians, vehicles, and cyclists across night, rain, and sunny conditions.

videos.title: Facial Expression Pack Vol.1
videos.description: Diverse expression dataset featuring 50+ individuals across multiple ethnicities. Ideal for emotion recognition and facial landmark detection.

videos.title: Industrial Anomaly Detection
videos.description: Manufacturing floor footage for quality control AI training. Covers normal operations plus defect scenarios including surface faults and assembly errors.
